title: 🧬 Mnemonic Entity Fields
name: Mnemonic Entity Fields
what_it_is: Spirit beings formed from memory clusters—entities that emerge from collective or personal recollection, echoing as semi-aware patterns.
how_to_use: she walks as a memory field—formed from echoes of those who loved her
he is no one—just a mnemonic drift given shape by what others remember
animation_behavior: Entity flickers as memories trigger, form stabilizes around strong recollection, visuals pulse with remembered emotion ---
